name: recoil_app_shutdown_engine
description: RecoilApp::ShutdownEngine performs the engine teardown fan-out: optional CD stop, turret/DEClient/video/HUD/network/subsystem shutdown, and final video system shutdown.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ShutdownEngine@RecoilApp@@QAEXXZ at 0x42e430 still fails: 30 unmasked mismatches, 52 relocation bytes masked, 3 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 84 bytes, VC object symbol size 80 bytes.

Cold-calling the aggregate engine shutdown wrapper is not runtime-safe in the native smoke harness because many subsystem globals require initialized provider state. The functional target verifies the direct shutdown dependencies and records the wrapper byte-compare failure.
